memoryArtifacts.headline: Ottokar II de Bohême (1230-1278)
memoryArtifacts.description:
Ottokar II (aussi écrit Otakar ou Přemysl Otakar/Ottokar) (v. 1230 – 26 août 1278 à Dürnkrut en Autriche) est roi de Bohême de 1253 à 1278.

Origine

Il est le fils de Venceslas Ier Premysl et de Cuné …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Przemysl Otakar II King Of Bohmen於1232年出生在捷克尼布可姆e斯特可 可拉洛維艾時，他的父親Václav I Jednooký Přemyslovec27歲，母親Kunigunde von Hohenstaufen30歲。他於1252年2月11日與Margarete von Babenberg在奧地利尼德洛斯特利希布盧可 安 德 雷塔海波格 安 德 堂瑙結婚。他去世於1278年8月26日在奧地利尼德洛斯特利希亞瑟恩多福迪可盧特享年46歲，埋葬在捷克普拉哈。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Przemysl Otakar II King Of Bohmen于1232年出生在捷克尼布可姆e斯特可 可拉洛維艾时，他的父亲Václav I Jednooký Přemyslovec27岁，母亲Kunigunde von Hohenstaufen30岁。他于1252年2月11日与Margarete von Babenberg在奥地利尼德洛斯特利希布盧可 安 德 雷塔海波格 安 德 堂瑙结婚。他去世于1278年8月26日在奥地利尼德洛斯特利希亞瑟恩多福迪可盧特享年46岁，埋葬在捷克普拉哈。

nameMeanings.name: Bohmen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Fritz.  French Andre, Marthe.
Swiss German: from a short form of the medieval personal name Liborius (see Bohr 1 and Liborio ). This surname is also found in France (mainly Marne).
Swedish (Bohrén): ornamental name from Bohr 3 + the adjectival suffix -én, a derivative of Latin enius ‘relating to’.

variants.name: Bohr
meanings: German: from a short form of the medieval personal name Liborius (see Liborio ), the name of the patron saint of the city of Paderborn.
Germanized form of Sorbian Bór or other Slavic Bor .
Danish and Swedish: from North German   Bahr   ‘bear’.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

nameMeanings.name: King
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the vocabulary word for a male monarch, bestowed, especially in America, with a hint of the notion that the bearer would have kingly qualities;  compare  Duke   and   Earl .  In some cases it may be a transferred use of the surname (originally a nickname or an occupational name given to someone who was employed in a royal household). Its frequency among African Americans is no doubt partly attributable to the civil rights leader  Martin Luther King  (  1929–68 ). It is also used as a short form of   Kingsley .

variants.name: Kingsley
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, originally a local name derived from various places (in Cheshire, Hampshire, Staffordshire) named in Old English as Cyningeslēah ‘king's wood’.

nameMeanings.name: Of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

en.lifeSummary: When Przemysl Otakar II King Of Bohmen was born in 1232, in Městec Králové, Nymburk, Czechia, his father, Václav I Jednooký Přemyslovec, was 27 and his mother, Kunigunde von Hohenstaufen, was 30. He married Margarete von Babenberg on 11 February 1252, in Hainburg an der Donau, Bruck an der Leitha, Lower Austria, Austria. He died on 26 August 1278, in Dürnkrut, Gänserndorf, Lower Austria, Austria, at the age of 46, and was buried in Prague, Czechia.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Przemysl Otakar II King Of Bohmen est né en 1232, à Městec Králové, Nymburk, République tchèque, son père, Václav I Jednooký Přemyslovec, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Kunigunde von Hohenstaufen, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Margarete von Babenberg le 11 février 1252, à Hainburg an der Donau, Bruck an der Leitha, Niederösterreich, Autriche. Il est décédé le 26 août 1278, à Dürnkrut, Gänserndorf, Niederösterreich, Autriche, à l’âge de 46 ans, et a été enterré à Prague, République tchèque.

de.Klein Königsberg, Ragoszen, Angerapp, Ea: Klein Königsberg, Ragoszen, Kreis Angerapp, Ostpreußen, Preußen, Deutschland
de.lifeSummary: Als Przemysl Otakar II King Of Bohmen 1232 in Městec Králové, Nymburk, Tschechien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Václav I Jednooký Přemyslovec 27 und seine Mutter Kunigunde von Hohenstaufen 30. Er hat am 11. Februar 1252 in Hainburg an der Donau, Bruck an der Leitha, Niederösterreich, Österreich Margarete von Babenberg geheiratet. Er starb am 26. August 1278 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Dürnkrut, Gänserndorf, Niederösterreich, Österreich und wurde in Prag, Tschechien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Przemysl Otakar II King Of Bohmen è nato il nel 1232 nel Městec Králové, Nymburk, Cechia, il suo padre, Václav I Jednooký Přemyslovec, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Kunigunde von Hohenstaufen, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Margarete von Babenberg il 11 febbraio 1252, nel Hainburg an der Donau, Bruck an der Leitha, Niederösterreich, Austria. Morì il 26 agosto 1278, nel Dürnkrut, Gänserndorf, Niederösterreich, Austria, all'età di 46 anni, e fu sepolto a Praga, Cechia.

ja.lifeSummary: Przemysl Otakar II King Of Bohmenが1232年にチェコニーンブルクムeステック クルaロveで生まれた時，父Václav I Jednooký Přemyslovecは27歳，母Kunigunde von Hohenstaufenは30歳であった。1252年2月11日にオーストリアニーデルoステレイチブルック アン ダー レイサヘインブルグ アン ダー ドナウでMargarete von Babenbergと結婚した。彼は1278年8月26日にオーストリアニーデルoステレイチグaンセルンドルフドuルンクルトで46歳で死去し，チェコプラハにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Przemysl Otakar II King Of Bohmen(이)가 1232년 체코 니버크 e스테크 크a로브e에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Václav I Jednooký Přemyslovec(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Kunigunde von Hohenstaufen(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1252년 2월 11일 오스트리아 니더o스터레이치 브럭 앤 데르 레이스아 하인버그 앤 데르 도나에서 Margarete von Babenberg(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1278년 8월 26일 오스트리아 니더o스터레이치 그a세른도르프 드u른크루트에서 46세의 나이로 사망했으며 체코 프라하에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Przemysl Otakar II King Of Bohmen nasceu em 1232, em Městec Králové, Nymburk, Chequia, seu pai, Václav I Jednooký Přemyslovec, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Kunigunde von Hohenstaufen, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Margarete von Babenberg em 11 de fevereiro de 1252, em Hainburg an der Donau, Bruck an der Leitha, Niederösterreich, Áustria. Ele faleceu em 26 de agosto de 1278, em Dürnkrut, Gänserndorf, Niederösterreich, Áustria, com 46 anos, e foi sepultado em Praha, Chequia.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Przemysl Otakar II King Of Bohmen родился в 1232 г. в местности мeстек крaловe, нимбурк, Чехия, его отцу по имени Václav I Jednooký Přemyslovec было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Kunigunde von Hohenstaufen, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Margarete von Babenberg 11 февраля 1252 г. в местности ханбург ан дир донау, брукк ан дир лита, ниедирoстирраич, Австрия. Он умер 26 августа 1278 г. в местности дuрнкрут, гaнсирндорф, ниедирoстирраич, Австрия в возрасте 46 лет и был похоронен в местности Прага, Чехия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Przemysl Otakar II King Of Bohmen nació en 1232, en Městec Králové, Nymburk, Chequia, su papá, Václav I Jednooký Přemyslovec, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Kunigunde von Hohenstaufen, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Margarete von Babenberg el 11 de febrero de 1252, en Hainburg an der Donau, Bruck an der Leitha, Niederösterreich, Austria. Murió el 26 de agosto de 1278, en Dürnkrut, Gänserndorf, Niederösterreich, Austria, a la edad de 46 años, y fue sepultado en Praga, Chequia.
